title: How can I fix websites not loading properly in Firefox for iOS?
content: Clear the browser cache and cookies from Firefox settings to remove corrupted data. Update the app to the latest version available in the App Store. If the problem persists, restart your device or reinstall Firefox to resolve potential software issues.
